data.name: 性愛節拍
data.detailed_description:
藍圖

本體包含10首樂曲，並在後續半年中將陸續推出5首免費樂曲。同時DLC「Story Vol.0」也會追加新內容。此外，可自行編輯譜面、上傳音樂背景圖片的功能編輯器，以及創意工坊也正在加緊開發中。


關於此遊戲

基礎遊戲包含歌曲遊玩內容與第一個體驗故事，其餘ASMR故事需額外購買DLC解鎖。

我們每個月會持續更新內容，感謝您的理解與支持。

《性愛節拍》是一款專為成人玩家打造的音樂節奏遊戲，將精準的節拍操作與火辣的動漫CG完美結合。每一首音樂都是一場視覺與聽覺的狂歡，音符飛舞間，色情CG動畫層層綻放，帶你體驗前所未有的沉浸式快感！

 

  • 雙向音符流：音符從螢幕左右兩側持續生成，沿著軌道滑向中央判定區。

  • 精準判定：在音符抵達中間時，按下對應按鍵（支援鍵盤/手把），觸發Perfect/Good/Bad/Miss判定。

  • CG動畫聯動：每次成功判定，當前曲目搭配的CG將播放動作動畫，與節奏點精準同步，形成強烈視聽衝擊。

  • 連擊推進：連續Perfect判定將累積「熱力值」，填滿後進入火熱狀態，額外加分。

 

  • 精美色情CG：每首曲目搭配一張精美CG並包含細膩動畫，涵蓋前戲、高潮等階段，隨連擊進度逐步變化。

  • 她不是紙片人：每個角色都擁有獨立檔案，你將以自己身份與她們展開各種色情故事。

  • 動態節奏同步：CG動畫播放與音樂BPM完美匹配，你按下的每一拍，都是她的尖叫。

  • 愛心音符：特殊愛心音符，精準按下，她將爆發專屬色情語音，直鑽你腦門！

  • 三檔難度：簡單難度輕鬆沉浸，或在困難難度挑戰極限操作。

  • 動聽的歌曲：10首優美動聽的歌曲，每首都是為她量身定制的性愛BGM，多語言、多風格。

  • 排行榜：衝高分，在排行榜留下你的名字，「性愛之神」非你莫屬。

  • 自動演奏：通關後解鎖無人干擾的觀賞模式，音符自動Perfect，盡情欣賞她為你高潮的每一幀！

  • ❤️ASMR故事模式❤️：全程ASMR立體聲，她貼耳呢喃，從誘惑到狂亂高潮。戴上耳機，呼吸、心跳、濕潤聲環繞大腦，雞皮疙瘩狂飆到靈魂出竅！——❗本體免費1個，DLC解鎖全員私密劇場！

 

真希 Maki  B84–W54–H82

鄰居家的女孩。 文靜得像午後圖書館，害羞到連「謝謝」都輕得像嘆息。成績明明不差，卻總捏著數學卷子敲你門——只因每次你俯身講解，她指尖碰到你的手，就會紅到耳根，心跳亂得像暴雨敲窗。

 

葵 Aoi  B87–W56–H86

賭場新晋兔女郎。 她是鄉下女孩，第一次進城打工，單純得連「歡迎光臨」都說得磕磕巴巴。端托盤時總踩到自己高跟鞋，慌慌張張把飲料灑一地，惹得客人哈哈大笑。她把每份小費都攢著，夢想攢夠錢買一台粉色遊戲機。

 

茜 Akane  B106-W62-H92

你的繼母，家庭主婦。 丈夫冷落多年，她白天操持家務，夜裡獨守空房，豐滿肉體無人問津。G罩杯巨乳在圍裙下晃蕩，肥臀無人拍打，騷穴夜夜濕熱難耐。她壓抑著飢渴，眼神卻總在你身上流連，欲火暗燒，渴求禁忌的撫慰。

 

千夏 Chinatsu  B95–W59–H89

公司裡的後輩。 她極端害羞，一被你盯就慌亂低頭、假裝狂敲鍵盤，耳尖瞬間通紅。表面怯生得像隻受驚小鹿，實則內心悶騷得驚人——每當壓抑不住對你的渴望，她便借口腹痛衝進廁所，咬緊袖口，腦海裡反覆描摹你的嗓音與指尖，在潮濕的喘息與指縫間，偷偷攀上頂峰。

 

坦娜 Tanner  B112-W63-H93

來自外國的沙灘救生員，性格豪放爽朗，行事大大咧咧。她身材豐滿，胸部傲人，肌肉線條因常年游泳而緊實性感，黝黑的皮膚散發野性光澤。她熱衷於解決問題，無論是溺水危機還是遊客的私密需求，她都以直率熱情的方式應對，尤其擅長用大膽的方式「釋放」他人的慾望。

 

結衣 Yui  B101–W57–H89

你交往了一年的女友。 她溫柔得像一團棉花糖，說話軟軟的，總不自覺靠近你。她幾乎從不違背你的意思，只要你開口，她就點頭答應，眼睛亮晶晶地說「我可以」。她有些笨拙，小事也常手忙腳亂，卻從不推卸，只會低頭小聲說「對不起」。她把聽話當成愛的證明，偶爾偷偷抬頭看你，生怕你不高興。

 

樱 Sakura  B93–W58–H84

你好友的親姐姐。 表面是陽光活力的健身房有氧舞蹈教練，私下卻是妖媚致命的性感女王。火紅長髮如烈焰披肩，膚白勝雪，D罩杯飽滿胸脯，修長美腿總裹絲襪。她愛用香油挑逗偷窺她的男孩，引誘他們沉淪於她多變的淫靡遊戲，甘願成為她專屬的秘密性奴。

 

凛 Rin  B79–W53–H79

舞蹈學院芭蕾舞系學生。 沉默寡言，生活只剩舞蹈。清晨五點起練，夜裡仍在把杆前劈叉。更衣室裡，她獨自撫平舞衣，指尖掠過乳尖，呼吸微亂，鏡面映出濕潤的唇與微啟的腿間。她的眼神永遠專注，卻藏著一絲無人知曉的渴望。

 

诗织 Shiori  B96–W58–H86

女子大學文學系學生。 父母是傳統教育者，父親任教古典文學，母親經營茶道教室。從小就讀女校，生活被禮儀與禁忌填滿。她氣質清冷優雅，言行得體，穿著永遠是素色連衣裙或簡約和服。表面是溫室裡的優等生，內心卻因長期壓抑而焦躁。喜歡深夜寫詩，用隱晦的比喻表達對自由與親密的渴望。外表克制，身體卻敏感，對觸碰有近乎本能的反應。

 

美月 Mizuki  B104–W59–H90

火辣身材的色情小說家。 筆下劇情香豔無底線，粉絲狂熱追捧，封她為「最淫蕩女作家」。但無人知曉，她其實是個毫無性經驗的處女。寫作時，她常因幻想劇情而情慾失控，獨自自慰到高潮；現實中，她強裝放蕩，用誇張淫詞掩蓋羞恥，只因「婊子人設不能崩」。

data.short_description: 沉浸在激情火熱的節奏世界！《性愛節拍》（Sex Beats）是一款融合音樂節拍與熱辣動漫CG的成人節奏遊戲。音符從螢幕兩側飛來，精準按鍵觸發判定，即可觸發誘人動畫+ASMR立體聲耳姦，與音樂完美同步，帶來心跳加速的快感！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7
  • 處理器: IntelCore i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Sex Beats
data.detailed_description:
Roadmap

The base game includes 10 songs, with 5 additional free songs to be released gradually over the next six months. DLC Story Vol.0 will also add new content. Additionally, an editor allowing players to create their own charts and upload custom music background images, along with a workshop feature, is currently in active development.


About the Game

Sex Beats is an adult rhythm game crafted for mature players, perfectly blending precise beat-hitting with scorching anime CG. Every song is a visual & auditory orgasm—notes dance, erotic animations unfold layer by layer, delivering an unprecedented immersive ecstasy!

 

  • Dual-lane note flow: notes continuously spawn from left and right, sliding toward the center judgment zone.

  • Precise judgment: hit the corresponding key/controller the moment notes reach the center → Perfect/Good/Bad/Miss.

  • CG animation link: every successful hit triggers an action animation from the song’s dedicated CG, perfectly synced to the beat for intense audiovisual impact.

  • Combo progression: consecutive Perfects fill the “Lust Meter”; once full, enter Fever state and earn massive bonus scores.

 

  • Stunning erotic CG: each song pairs with one exquisite CG containing delicate animations covering foreplay, climax, and every stage in between — evolving as your combo climbs.

  • She’s more than 2D: every girl has her own independent profile. You become the protagonist in her personal erotic story.

  • Dynamic rhythm sync: CG animations match the music BPM perfectly — every beat you hit is her scream.

  • Heart notes: nail these special pink notes and she’ll unleash exclusive erotic voice lines that drill straight into your brain!

  • Three difficulty levels: relax and immerse in Easy, or push your limits in Hard.

  • 10 breathtaking tracks: each custom-composed as her personal sex soundtrack in different languages and styles.

  • Leaderboards: rack up insane scores and etch your name as the undisputed “God of Sex”.

  • Auto-play mode: unlocked after clearing a song — notes hit Perfect automatically so you can sit back and savor every frame of her climax.

  • ❤️ASMR Story Mode❤️: full binaural ASMR experience. She whispers right in your ear from teasing seduction to wild, uncontrollable orgasm. Put on headphones — breathing, heartbeat, wet sounds surround you until goosebumps reach your soul! ❗1 free in base game, DLC unlocks private theater for all girls!

  

Maki   B84–W54–H82

The girl next door. Quiet as an afternoon library, shy to the point where even a “thank you” is as soft as a sigh. Her grades are clearly not bad, yet she always clutches her math test and knocks on your door—because every time you lean in to explain, her fingertips brush your hand, and she blushes to the roots of her ears, her heartbeat chaotic like a rainstorm pounding the window.

 

Aoi   B87–W56–H86

The new bunny girl at the casino. A country girl working in the city for the first time, so innocent that even “welcome” comes out stammered. She trips over her own high heels while carrying trays, frantically spilling drinks everywhere, making guests burst into laughter. She saves every tip, dreaming of buying a pink gaming console.

 

Akane  B106-W62-H92

Your stepmother, a housewife. Neglected by her husband for years, she manages the household by day and guards an empty bed by night, her voluptuous body untouched. G-cup breasts sway under her apron, her plump hips unspanked, her needy pussy wet and aching every night. She suppresses her thirst, but her eyes linger on you, desire smoldering, craving forbidden comfort.

 

Chinatsu   B95–W59–H89

Your junior colleague at the company. Extremely shy, she panics and looks down the moment you stare, pretending to frantically type, her ear tips instantly red. On the surface, she’s timid like a startled fawn, but inside, she’s shockingly repressed and lewd—whenever she can’t hold back her desire for you, she excuses herself with a stomachache, rushes to the bathroom, bites her sleeve, and in her mind repeatedly traces your voice and fingertips, secretly climaxing amid damp gasps and between her fingers.

 

Tanner  B112-W63-H93

A foreign beach lifeguard, bold and straightforward, acting with carefree abandon.   • Precise judgment: hit the corresponding key/controller the moment notes reach the center → Perfect/Good/Bad/Miss.

  • CG animation link: every successful hit triggers an action animation from the song’s dedicated CG, perfectly synced to the beat for intense audiovisual impact.

  • Combo progression: consecutive Perfects fill the “Lust Meter”; once full, enter Fever state and earn massive bonus scores.

 

  • Stunning erotic CG: each song pairs with one exquisite CG containing delicate animations covering foreplay, climax, and every stage in between — evolving as your combo climbs.

  • She’s more than 2D: every girl has her own independent profile. You become the protagonist in her personal erotic story.

  • Three difficulty levels: relax and immerse in Easy, or push your limits in Hard.

  • Leaderboards: rack up insane scores and etch your name as the undisputed “God of Sex”.
